description: Memory-relevant inference inputs for REGISTERED_MODELS. Spatial/batch shapes are resolved from model packages per backend (see backend_package_input_profiles). Task profiles define API methods and non-spatial inputs (prompts, classes, decode limits).

resolution_modes.static: Single fixed value from package artifacts; use for profiling peaks when the runtime path is fixed-shape.
resolution_modes.dynamic: Variable at inference time or bounded by min/opt/max; profile at the declared maximum for admission.

onnx.description: Roboflow ONNX packages: preprocessing and batch policy in inference_config.json; exported graph input shape in weights.onnx (should match static export).

dynamic.profiling_note: Profile at max_dynamic_batch_size for worst-case ORT allocator peaks.
Sweep upper bound from dynamic_spatial_size_mode or package docs; divisible-padding uses divisor constraints.

torch-script.description: Roboflow TorchScript packages: same inference_config.json as ONNX; graph fixed to forward_pass.static_batch_size and training_input_size at export.

trt.description: Roboflow TensorRT packages: spatial preprocessing from inference_config.json; engine batch profile from trt_config.json (static or min/opt/max dynamic). Runtime spatial limits are baked into engine.plan / optimization profile.

dynamic.profiling_note: Profile at dynamic_batch_size_max for admission; opt is the builder tuning point.

static.profiling_note: Preprocess target; must match engine input binding shape when engine is static.

dynamic.when: TensorRT optimization profile exposes variable H
dynamic.profiling_note: Read min/opt/max from engine optimization profile via TRT APIs, not from inference_config alone.

dynamic.when: TensorRT optimization profile exposes variable W

torch.description: Native PyTorch packages: Roboflow exports use inference_config.json when present; library checkpoints (SAM, RF-DETR local) may use package-specific JSON instead.

static.profiling_note: Derived from SAM image_encoder.img_size after load.
Same as height for square SAM encoder input.

hugging-face.description: Hugging Face layout packages: shapes and generation limits from transformers config artifacts (not inference_config.json).

static.profiling_note: Often 1 for VLMs; multi-image prompts batch in processor.

dynamic.profiling_note: Batch driven by number of images passed to prompt().

static.profiling_note: First matching key wins per model family.

dynamic.when: Model accepts variable resolution in processor
Model accepts variable resolution in processor

dynamic.profiling_note: Sweep representative prompt strings for admission.
KV-cache peak scales with decode length cap.

method_kwargs_memory_relevant.name: image_size
method_kwargs_memory_relevant.notes: Runtime resize override when package allows dynamic spatial size.

vlm_florence2.description: Florence-2 prompt() with task-specific decoder head.

axes.name: num_classes
axes.profiling_note: Package profiling supplies class list; detect() runs once per class.

axes.name: num_classes
axes.profiling_note: Profiling package should include representative class queries.

interactive_sam.description: embed_images then segment_images with geometry prompts.

video_tracking.description: HF streaming video: prompt / track with session state.

axes.name: session_frames
axes.profiling_note: Sweep track iterations for worst-case session memory.

ocr_generative.description: TrOCR infer: internal generate() on pixel batch.
